meaning: n.哈巴涅拉(古巴的一种舞曲,类似探戈),哈巴涅拉舞
examples: In 1914, Handy followed up Memphis Blues with his next hit, another 12-bar blues piece with a 16-bar habanera section.
Norman clearly enjoys the only nod to opera on the new disc, a jazzed-up version of the "Habanera" from Bizet's Carmen.
Carlotta's theme, a Ravelian habanera, is also an important interior narrator.
